description_long: This warehouse is a large, rectangular building with a flat roof and prominent red structural framing along its exterior walls. The facade features a series of evenly spaced vertical and horizontal beams, with light blue-green wall panels set between them. One side of the building includes a covered loading dock area with multiple open bays and a ramp, suggesting functionality for vehicle access and goods handling. The structure sits on a textured, gray paved surface, which extends around the building and provides ample space for maneuvering. The roof is plain and unadorned, with no visible skylights or rooftop equipment. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing function and accessibility for storage and logistics operations.
description: A large, flat-roofed warehouse with red framing, blue-green wall panels, and a covered loading dock with a ramp on a gray paved base.
description_view_0: The rear of the warehouse shows the red-framed structure and solid wall panels, with no visible entryways or loading docks.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the open loading dock area with multiple bays and a ramp, framed by red beams and blue-green panels.
description_view_2: The side view reveals the ramp leading up to the loading dock and the continuous red framing along the building's length.
description_view_3: The opposite end of the warehouse displays a mostly solid wall with minimal openings and the same red and blue-green color scheme.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade features a grid of bold red structural beams framing light blue-green wall panels, with a prominent open loading dock area and a ramp for vehicle access. The design is simple and functional, with no decorative elements or visible windows.
attribute_roof_structure: The roof is flat and featureless, constructed from a solid material with no visible skylights, HVAC units, or other rooftop installations.
